summarySection.title: Professional Summary
summarySection.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience in full-stack development, specializing in Django applications, cloud architecture, and team leadership. Proven track record of scaling startups from $4M to $40M revenue while maintaining high-performance systems.

aboutSection.title: About Branndon
descriptions: Senior software engineer with over 15 years of professional experience in full-stack development and team leadership. Led technical initiatives at The Penny Hoarder that optimized site performance from 2.7 seconds to 0.89 and supported company growth from startup to recognized media platform.

Currently at Headspace, specializing in Django-based application development with focus on scalable and security-focused software architecture. Mentor junior engineers and guide technical decisions while implementing modern development practices.

description: End-to-end development of Django-based applications, ensuring optimized ORM querying, scalable middleware integration, and robust migration management. Guide software architecture focusing on modular design, scalability, and security.
Lead exploratory projects with CI/CD, TDD, and agile methodologies. Mentor junior engineers, promote code reviews, and ensure adherence to Django best practices.
achievements: Architected and delivered Django projects with focus on performance, security, and scalability
Championed implementation of CI/CD pipelines, ensuring streamlined deployments and integrations
Mentored junior engineers, emphasizing Django best practices and effective ORM utilization

description: Led technical architecture and development for high-traffic media platform, optimizing performance and implementing scalable solutions.
Managed team growth and technical strategy during company scaling from $4M to $40M annual revenue.
achievements: Optimized site load time from 2.7 seconds to 0.89 seconds, significantly improving user experience
Designed machine learning-based email content recommendation system
Led emergency response and hotfix deployment processes for production systems

facts.title: Performance Optimization
facts.description: Reduced site load times by 68% through architectural improvements and optimization strategies

facts.title: Team Leadership
facts.description: Led technical teams during company growth from 10 to 100+ employees
